section.title: GPT Image 2 prompt showcase
section.description: A dense library of reusable prompts paired with generated outputs. Open any card to send that prompt straight into the generator.

labels.dialog_description: Full size preview of the generated showcase image.

13460.title: VR Headset Exploded View Poster
13460.description: Generates a high-tech exploded view diagram of a VR headset with detailed component callouts and promotional text.

13983.title: Momotaro Explainer Slide in Hybrid Style
13983.description: A prompt that combines the simple, warm aesthetic of Irasutoya illustrations with the high-information density characteristic of Japanese government slides.

16624.title: Japanese Elephant Day Magazine Feature
16624.description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese editorial-style magazine page about Elephant Day, ideal for seasonal feature graphics, lifestyle spreads, or educational zoo-themed art.
